title: Moroccan Beef Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful tagine that combines the richness of beef with the spices of Morocco. This dish is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Season the beef with salt, black pepper, cumin, cinnamon, and paprika.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the beef until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth and prunes to the pot. Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Serve the beef and sauce over couscous or rice.
